contract_clauses.text: Beneficiaries must have at least one month of enrollment during the performance year and must not be enrolled in a Medicare Advantage plan, have end-stage renal disease, or reside outside the ACO's service area to be eligible for attribution.
contract_clauses.section: Members must have at least 1 month(s) of enrollment during the performance year. ESRD exclusion is applied. Service area residency is required.
contract_clauses.title: ELIG-1.0

code_references.logic_summary: Load eligibility records for each member. Calculate months of enrollment during the performance year. Apply exclusions: ESRD (dialysis claims with N18.6), out-of-service-area (ZIP code check), deceased before performance year. Members passing all checks are marked eligible for attribution.
